Package net.apartium.cocoabeans.state

Interface SetObservable<E>

Type Parameters:
E - element type
All Superinterfaces:
CollectionObservable<E,Set<E>>, Observable<Set<E>>
@AvailableSince("0.0.39") public interface SetObservable<E> extends CollectionObservable<E,Set<E>>
Represents an observable containing multiple unique values
See Also:
  • CollectionObservable
  • Observable

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SetObservable<E>
    filter(Function<E,Observable<Boolean>> filter)
    Filters the elements of this observable based on the provided filter function.
    <T> SetObservable<E>
    filter(Function<E,Observable<T>> mapper, Predicate<T> filter)
    Filters the elements of this observable based on a mapping function and a predicate.

    Methods inherited from interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.state.CollectionObservable

    add, addAll, clear, remove, removeAll, removeIf, retainAll, size

    Methods inherited from interface net.apartium.cocoabeans.state.Observable

    flatMap, get, lazyWatch, lazyWatch, map, observe, removeObserver

  • Method Details

    • filter

      SetObservable<E> filter(Function<E,Observable<Boolean>> filter)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionObservable
      Filters the elements of this observable based on the provided filter function. Only elements for which the provided function evaluates to an observable that emits true will be included in the resulting observable.
      Specified by:
      filter in interface CollectionObservable<E,Set<E>>
      Parameters:
      filter - a function that takes an element of type E as input and returns an Observable of Boolean indicating whether the element should be included.
      Returns:
      a new CollectionObservable containing the filtered elements.

    • filter

      <T> SetObservable<E> filter(Function<E,Observable<T>> mapper, Predicate<T> filter)
      Description copied from interface: CollectionObservable
      Filters the elements of this observable based on a mapping function and a predicate. The mapping function transforms each element into an Observable of type T, and the predicate determines whether the resulting value should be included.
      Specified by:
      filter in interface CollectionObservable<E,Set<E>>
      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of the values produced by the mapping function.
      Parameters:
      mapper - a function that takes an element of type E as input and returns an Observable of type T.
      filter - a predicate that determines whether the mapped value of type T should be included in the resulting observable.
      Returns:
      a new CollectionObservable containing the elements that pass the filter criteria.
